description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 24, 2025 at 3:46 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on Pacific Avenue near Battery Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound on Pacific Avenue when it slowed to a stop for a heavy truck stopped facing west on Pacific 
Avenue. While the Waymo AV was stopped, the heavy truck reversed in an angle and the rear right side of the heavy truck made contact 
with the front of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. 
The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
